title: No Concept 2024
description: The studio's flagship project: over 30 custom pieces for the No Concept brand space. A clothing collection united by a single visual code. The project included concept development, production, and an art performance on the collection launch day at the brand's boutique.

details.task: Create a unique collection of custom pieces for the brand.
details.solution: Developed a visual code blending street aesthetics with the brand's identity. Produced 30+ pieces across different categories.
details.result: Drew attention to the brand through art. The space became a destination for the brand's audience. All pieces sold out within the first month.
